Who We Are

About BharatVarta

Netaji Yuva Sanghtan — Est. 2025
Welcome to BharatVarta

BharatVarta is not just a blog. It is a movement. A platform of national awakening, youth leadership, and intellectual revolution, inspired by the vision of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose and the heroes of our freedom struggle.

We believe that today's youth are the soldiers of a new revolution, not of arms, but of awareness, service, and truth. Through this platform, we aim to revive patriotism, promote national values, and encourage free yet responsible discussion on issues that shape India's destiny.

Our Mission

To awaken, unite, and empower the youth of India under the ideals of Netaji, for a stronger, self-reliant, and awakened Bharat.

Our Vision

To build a generation of aware, disciplined, and service-minded patriots who carry forward India's cultural and spiritual strength into the future.

What We Do
  • Publish news, articles, and research on India's forgotten heroes
  • Promote youth engagement through awareness drives and discussions
  • Provide factual insights into national and international issues
  • Celebrate the idea of Seva Parmo Dharma — "Service is the highest duty"
  • Encourage cultural revival and ideological clarity among youth
Our Inspiration
"Give me blood, and I will give you freedom."
— Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose
That same fire now lives in every youth who believes in building a New Bharat. BharatVarta stands as the voice of those patriots, the thinkers, dreamers, and doers who carry the torch of truth, unity, and service.
Jai Hind!
"Truth. Service. Unity."
© 2025 Netaji Yuva Sanghtan

Legal
Privacy Policy & Terms of Use
Effective Date: 5 October 2025 · nysbharatvarta.org

1. Introduction

Welcome to Netaji Yuva Sanghtan (NYS) — a patriotic youth organization dedicated to the vision of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website nysbharatvarta.org and participate in our activities, events, or campaigns. By using this website, you agree to the terms mentioned here.

2. Information We Collect

  • Personal Information: Name, Email address, Phone number (when you fill out forms)
  • Non-Personal Data: Browser type, device info, pages visited, and general analytics
  • Voluntary Submissions: Messages, feedback, or uploaded content shared via forms or emails

We do not collect sensitive data such as banking details, Aadhaar, or passwords.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To communicate event updates and responses to your queries
  • To issue participation or achievement certificates
  • To improve our website and content quality
  • To maintain internal records and membership lists

We will never sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party.

4. Cookies and Analytics

Our website may use cookies and web analytics tools (like Google Analytics or Blogger stats) to understand visitor engagement and enhance user experience. You can disable cookies through your browser settings at any time.

5. External Links

Our website may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those websites. We advise you to read their respective privacy policies before interacting.

6. Content Ownership

All logos, text, photographs, articles, and materials published on this site are the intellectual property of Netaji Yuva Sanghtan (NYS) unless stated otherwise. Reproduction, republication, or redistribution without permission is strictly prohibited.

For permission requests, contact: netajiyuvasangathanofficial@gmail.com

7. Terms of Participation

  • You agree to maintain respect for all individuals and national sentiments
  • Any misuse of the NYS name, logo, or identity for personal or political gain is strictly prohibited
  • NYS reserves the right to revoke membership or website access for misconduct or misinformation

8. Limitation of Liability

While we strive to provide accurate and updated information, NYS does not guarantee completeness or accuracy of all data. We are not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of this website or its content.

9. Policy Updates

This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. We recommend reviewing this page regularly. Last updated: 5 October 2025.

10. Contact Us

📧 netajiyuvasangathanofficial@gmail.com
🌐 https://nysbharatvarta.org
📍 Netaji Yuva Sanghtan Headquarters, India

Declaration
"We, the members of Netaji Yuva Sanghtan, pledge to use all collected information solely for patriotic, educational, and national interest purposes, maintaining transparency and trust with every supporter of Bharat."
"Truth. Service. Unity."

NYS Research Wing
Submit Your Research
Contribute to India's intellectual awakening — submit original research for review and publication on BharatVarta.
How to Attach Your PDF
  • Open Google Drive at drive.google.com and sign in to your Google account
  • Click + New → File upload and select your research PDF from your device
  • Once uploaded, right-click the file → Share → Change to Anyone with the link → Viewer
  • Click Copy link and paste that link into the Drive Link field in the form below
Make sure sharing is set to "Anyone with the link" — otherwise we cannot open your paper.
Research Submission Form
By submitting, you confirm this research is original and unpublished. NYS reserves the right to reject submissions. Review takes 7–14 days and you will be notified by email.
